verdict: A pristine casual chart with perfect grid alignment, smooth lane sweeping, and excellent physical playability.

issues.problem: The 1-beat transition from GAP to BAR (9.03s to 9.495s) introduces a sudden rhythm speed-up compared to the surrounding 2-beat pacing, which might catch casual players off guard.
The transition from the drop to the outro has an abrupt 3-beat gap (12.28s to 13.68s) that briefly disrupts the established steady physical pulse of the song.
